property.selectDatesDesc: Please select check-in and check-out dates

property.fullRefundDesc: Cancel 5 or more days before check-in for a 100% refund — no host approval required.
property.partialRefundDesc: Cancel 3 days before check-in for a 50% refund, unless the host approves a free cancellation.
property.noRefundDesc: Cancel within 24 hours of check-in — no automatic refund, unless the host approves a free cancellation.
property.refundNote: Service fees are refunded when cancellation qualifies for a full refund. Cleaning fees are always refunded.

hostGuarantee.title: Hostiva Host Guarantee
hostGuarantee.heroDesc: Up to $1,000,000 USD in property damage protection for every booking — at no extra cost to you.
hostGuarantee.coverageDesc: Our guarantee covers a wide range of property damage caused by guests during their stay.
hostGuarantee.claimsDesc: Filing a claim is simple, transparent, and fast.
hostGuarantee.beyondDesc: The Host Guarantee is just one part of our comprehensive host protection program.
hostGuarantee.liabilityDesc: Up to $1M coverage for third-party bodily injury or property damage claims.
hostGuarantee.guestVerificationDesc: All guests must verify their identity with government-issued ID before booking.
hostGuarantee.safetyLineDesc: Emergency support available around the clock for urgent safety issues.
hostGuarantee.incidentResponseDesc: Dedicated team to handle disputes, damages, and safety incidents swiftly.
hostGuarantee.protectedDesc: Every Hostiva host is automatically covered. No sign-up, no fees, no hassle.

coverageItems.furnitureDesc: Sofas, beds, TVs, kitchen appliances, and other household items.
coverageItems.flooringDesc: Hardwood floors, carpets, tiles, painted walls, and wallpaper.
coverageItems.windowsDesc: Broken glass, damaged frames, locks, and handles.
coverageItems.outdoorDesc: Patios, decks, gardens, fences, and outdoor furniture.
coverageItems.artDesc: Paintings, sculptures, mirrors, and decorative pieces.
coverageItems.plumbingDesc: Fixtures, faucets, light fittings, and wiring damage.

processSteps.documentDesc: Take clear photos and videos of any damage within 24 hours of guest checkout.
processSteps.fileClaimDesc: Submit your claim through the Host Dashboard with photos and a description of the damage.
processSteps.weReviewDesc: Our team reviews your claim, usually within 48-72 hours. We may contact the guest for their account.
processSteps.getReimbursedDesc: Once approved, funds are deposited directly to your payout method within 5-7 business days.

faqs.notCovered: What is NOT covered by the Host Guarantee?
faqs.notCoveredAnswer: The guarantee does not cover normal wear and tear, pre-existing damage, cash or securities, shared/common areas in multi-unit buildings, or damage caused by natural disasters.
faqs.filingDeadline: How long do I have to file a claim?
faqs.filingDeadlineAnswer: Claims must be filed within 14 days of the guest's checkout date, or before the next guest checks in — whichever comes first.
faqs.ownInsurance: Do I need my own insurance?
faqs.ownInsuranceAnswer: The Host Guarantee is not a replacement for homeowner's or renter's insurance. We recommend maintaining your own coverage as well.
faqs.deductibleAnswer: No. There is no deductible for Host Guarantee claims. If your claim is approved, you receive the full reimbursement amount.
faqs.liability: What about liability claims from guests?
faqs.liabilityAnswer: Our separate Host Liability Insurance covers up to $1M for third-party claims of bodily injury or property damage during a stay.
